title: Pistis Sophia: The Repentance of Wisdom
description: Sophia, trapped in the lower realms, sings thirteen repentances to the Light — a Gnostic drama of fall and redemption.
introduction: Sophia, trapped in the lower realms, sings thirteen repentances to the Light — a Gnostic drama of fall and redemption.

translation.text: O Light of lights, in whom I have had faith from the beginning, hearken now to my repentance.
